note: package_type/required/optional are derived from the real config.KNOWLEDGE_TYPE_TEMPLATES['Dashboard'] profile (Process, Task, System, Business Rule required; Risk optional) -- not the Phase 13 spec's illustrative Dashboard profile text. Business Rule is intentionally left Partial in the final state (no gap-answer script closes it) so the dataset's final coverage lands below 100%, matching the spec's ~89% target rather than a full close.
